d.t: Chào hỏi cơ bản

e.p: Hi, what's your name?
e.m: Chào lại và giới thiệu tên của bạn bằng [Your Name].
e.h: S + am/is/are + tên
e.s: Yesterday, I met someone new and I introduced myself. My name is [Your Name] and I am from my city. I am learning English now, and I will keep practising next week.

e.p: Hello, how are you today?
e.m: Trả lời cảm xúc hiện tại và nói lý do ngắn gọn.
e.h: I + am + adj + because + clause
e.s: This morning, I woke up early and I felt tired. I am fine now because I drank coffee, so I can work. I will rest more tonight.

e.p: Nice to meet you. Where are you from?
e.m: Nói nơi bạn đến ngắn gọn và thêm 1 câu về cảm nhận.
e.h: I + am/from + place + and + I + feel + adj
e.s: Last weekend, I went to a fair and many people asked me about my city. I am from Hanoi and I am proud of it. I am enjoying meeting new people and I will show them around someday.

e.p: Hey, do you have a nickname?
e.m: Nói về biệt danh (nếu có) hoặc nói không có biệt danh.
e.h: I + don’t have/have + a nickname + but + I + am called + ...
e.s: Yesterday, my friend called me by a funny name and I laughed. I don't have an official nickname but people call me [Your Name]. I am using it now, and I will tell others later.

e.p: Good morning! What do you usually do on weekends?
e.m: Mô tả ngắn thói quen cuối tuần (3-4 câu, có thời gian trước và kế hoạch tương lai).
e.h: Time → Past Simple → Result; use and/but/so/because; include Future simple
e.s: Last weekend, I stayed home and I cleaned my room because it was messy. I usually relax on Saturdays and I play games or read, but I also help my family. I am planning to visit a park next weekend, and I will invite a friend.

d.t: Hỏi tên và tuổi

e.p: Hi, how old are you?
e.m: Trả lời tuổi của bạn rõ ràng và tự nhiên.
e.h: I + am + number + years old
e.s: Yesterday, I celebrated a small party and people asked my age. I am 20 years old and I feel happy. I am studying more now because I want to improve, and I will learn new things next month.

e.p: When is your birthday?
e.m: Nói ngày sinh nhật (tháng + ngày) và mô tả 1 hoạt động bạn làm trước đây vào dịp đó.
e.h: My birthday is + date; Yesterday/Last year I + V-ed → so/result
e.s: Last year, I had a small dinner with family on my birthday and we sang songs. My birthday is on June 10. I am usually busy that day, but I will plan a trip next year.

e.p: Do you celebrate your birthday with friends or family?
e.m: Nói bạn thường tổ chức với ai và vì sao.
e.h: I + usually + V + with + people + because + reason
e.s: Last weekend, I celebrated with my family and we cooked together. I usually celebrate with my family because they are close to me and they help. I am happy when we are together, and I will invite friends next time.

e.p: Have you ever had a surprise birthday party?
e.m: Trả lời có/không, kể ngắn về lần đó (thời gian → hành động → kết quả).
e.h: Yes, I + V-ed + time + and + result
e.s: Yesterday, my sister surprised me and she invited some friends. I was really surprised and I cried a little because I wasn't expecting it. I am grateful now and I will remember that day.

e.p: Will you have a big party this year?
e.m: Nói kế hoạch tương lai về sinh nhật của bạn, kèm lý do ngắn.
e.h: I + will + V + because + reason; include present simple or continuous
e.s: Last week, I discussed plans with my family and we decided to meet. I will have a small party because we want to save money, and I am preparing invitations. I went shopping yesterday for decorations, so things are ready.

d.t: Hỏi về sức khỏe và trạng thái

e.p: Are you okay?
e.m: Trả lời trạng thái hiện tại ngắn gọn và vì sao (1 câu hiện tại, 1 câu lý do).
e.h: I + am + adj + because + clause
e.s: This morning, I woke up with a headache and I felt tired. I am okay now because I took medicine and I drank water. I will rest this evening.

e.p: Did you sleep well last night?
e.m: Nói có hoặc không và mô tả ngắn về việc đã xảy ra đêm qua.
e.h: Yes/No, I + V-ed + last night + so/result
e.s: Last night, I didn't sleep well because the neighbors were noisy. I slept a little and I felt tired this morning. I am drinking coffee now, and I will try to sleep earlier tonight.

e.p: Have you been exercising recently?
e.m: Nói về thói quen tập thể dục gần đây (present perfect hoặc present continuous), kèm lịch sử ngắn.
e.h: I + have been + V-ing / I + am + V-ing; include Past Simple time
e.s: Last week, I started jogging in the park and I felt better. I have been exercising three times a week and I am enjoying it. I will continue because it helps my mood.

e.p: What do you do when you feel stressed?
e.m: Mô tả 2-3 hoạt động bạn làm để giảm căng thẳng, có ít nhất một câu quá khứ và một câu tương lai.
e.h: Time → Past Simple → Result; I + usually + V; I + will + V
e.s: Yesterday, I listened to music and it relaxed me a lot. I usually talk to my sister and go for a walk because it helps. I am trying a new hobby now, and I will keep doing it when I am stressed.

e.p: Do you think you will be healthier next year?
e.m: Dự đoán tương lai về sức khỏe và giải thích ngắn vì sao.
e.h: I + think + I + will + V + because + clause; include Past Simple mention
e.s: Last year, I was not very active and I gained weight. I think I will be healthier next year because I have started exercising and eating better. I am following a plan now, so I expect good results.

d.t: Hỏi về nơi ở

e.p: Where do you live?
e.m: Nói nơi bạn đang sống ngắn gọn và thêm 1 câu về một điều bạn thích về nơi đó.
e.h: I + live + in + place; I + like + noun/because + clause
e.s: Last weekend, I showed my friend around my neighborhood and we walked a lot. I live in District 1 and I like the food there because it is delicious. I am enjoying the area now and I will invite friends to visit.

e.p: Do you live with your family?
e.m: Trả lời có/không, nêu số người trong gia đình và một hoạt động bạn làm cùng họ.
e.h: Yes/No, I + live + with + people; we + V-ed + time
e.s: Yesterday, we cooked dinner together and talked about our day. Yes, I live with my parents and one sibling, and we are close. I usually help at home, and I will cook with them again this weekend.

e.p: How long have you lived there?
e.m: Nói khoảng thời gian bạn đã sống ở đó và kể 1 việc đã làm khi mới đến.
e.h: I + have lived + for + time; When I arrived + Past Simple
e.s: Last week, I looked at old photos from when I first moved here. I have lived here for five years. When I arrived, I met my neighbors and they helped me, so I felt welcome.

e.p: Is your house near your school or workplace?
e.m: Trả lời vị trí tương đối và mô tả hành động bạn thường làm để đi lại.
e.h: It + is/was + near/far; I + usually + go by + transport; include Past Simple
e.s: Yesterday, I walked to the office because it was close and the weather was nice. My house is near my workplace, so I don't need a car. I am saving money on travel, and I will keep walking when possible.

e.p: Will you move to a new place soon?
e.m: Nói kế hoạch chuyển nhà hoặc không chuyển, nêu lý do ngắn.
e.h: I + will + V / I + am not going to + V; Past Simple mention a reason
e.s: Last month, I checked some apartments and I liked one. I will move next month because my job is closer to the new place. I am packing now, so things are a bit busy.

d.t: Giới thiệu gia đình

e.p: Do you have any siblings?
e.m: Trả lời có mấy anh chị em và nêu tuổi hoặc nghề ngắn gọn.
e.h: I + have + number + siblings; He/She + is + age/profession
e.s: Yesterday, I called my brother and we talked for a long time. I have one brother and one sister. My brother is 25 and he works at a company, and I will visit them next weekend.

e.p: Tell me about your parents.
e.m: Mô tả ngắn về bố mẹ: nghề nghiệp, tính cách (3-4 câu).
e.h: My father/mother + is + job + and + adj; Past Simple mention
e.s: Last year, my father retired and he started gardening. My father is a teacher and my mother is a nurse, and they are kind people. I am proud of them, so I help at home when I can.

e.p: Who is the oldest in your family?
e.m: Nói ai là người lớn tuổi nhất và mô tả 1 điều họ đã làm gần đây.
e.h: The oldest is + person; He/She + V-ed + time
e.s: Last weekend, my grandmother baked cakes for us and everyone enjoyed them. The oldest in my family is my grandmother. She is gentle and she always cooks for us, and I will visit her tomorrow.

e.p: Do you get along with your family?
e.m: Trả lời có hoặc không, nêu một ví dụ trong quá khứ và một kế hoạch tương lai.
e.h: Yes/No, we + V-ed + time + so/result; I + will + V
e.s: Yesterday, we had a small argument but we talked and solved it. Yes, I get along with my family because we communicate and respect each other. I am planning a family trip next month, and I will book tickets soon.

e.p: What family tradition do you like most?
e.m: Nói một truyền thống gia đình bạn thích, kể khi bạn làm điều đó lần cuối (thời gian → hành động → kết quả).
e.h: Time → Past Simple → Result; I + like + tradition + because + clause
e.s: Last weekend, we celebrated a small festival and we cooked traditional food together. I like our family dinners because they bring us closer. I am organizing one next weekend, so everyone will join.

d.t: Nghề nghiệp - Công việc

e.p: What do you do for work?
e.m: Nói nghề nghiệp hiện tại và một việc bạn làm mỗi ngày.
e.h: I + work as + job; I + usually + V (daily routine)
e.s: Yesterday, I worked on a project and I finished a report. I work as an office assistant and I answer emails every day. I am learning new skills now, and I will apply them soon.

e.p: Do you like your job?
e.m: Trả lời thích hay không, nêu lý do ngắn và một ví dụ quá khứ.
e.h: I + like/don't like + it because + clause; Past Simple example
e.s: Last week, I completed a difficult task and my manager praised me. I like my job because it is challenging and I learn a lot. I am improving slowly, so I feel motivated and I will try harder.

e.p: How long have you worked there?
e.m: Nói bạn đã làm ở đó bao lâu và kể 1 việc bạn đã làm khi mới bắt đầu.
e.h: I + have worked + for + time; When I started + Past Simple
e.s: Last year, I joined the team and I trained with seniors for a month. I have worked there for two years. When I started, I felt nervous but I learned quickly, and I will keep developing my skills.

e.p: Are you looking for a new job?
e.m: Trả lời có/không, nếu có nêu lý do và kế hoạch ngắn.
e.h: I + am/ am not + looking for + job; I + will + V / I + plan to + V
e.s: Yesterday, I updated my CV and I sent some applications. I am looking for a new job because I want more experience. I am studying for interviews now, and I will attend one next week.

e.p: What will you do if you get a promotion?
e.m: Nêu kế hoạch tương lai nếu được thăng chức, và nhắc lại 1 điều bạn đã làm để đạt mục tiêu đó.
e.h: If I + get + promotion, I + will + V; Past Simple mention effort
e.s: Last month, I worked overtime and I completed extra tasks to show my skills. If I get a promotion, I will lead a small team and improve our process. I am preparing for the role now, so I can succeed.

d.t: Sở thích đơn giản

e.p: What are your hobbies?
e.m: Liệt kê 2-3 sở thích và nói rõ bạn làm khi nào (ví dụ cuối tuần).
e.h: I + like + noun/V-ing; I + usually + V on + time
e.s: Last weekend, I tried painting and I enjoyed it. I like reading and playing football. I am playing football every Saturday, and I will read a new book next week.

e.p: Do you prefer indoor or outdoor activities?
e.m: Chọn 1 và giải thích lý do với một ví dụ đã xảy ra trong quá khứ.
e.h: I + prefer + indoor/outdoor because + clause; Past Simple example
e.s: Yesterday, I went hiking and I loved the fresh air. I prefer outdoor activities because they relax me. I am planning another hike next month, so I can enjoy nature again.

e.p: How often do you practice your hobby?
e.m: Nói tần suất (thường xuyên, mỗi tuần bao nhiêu lần) và kể về lần gần nhất bạn đã làm.
e.h: I + V + frequency (e.g., three times a week); Last + time + I + V-ed
e.s: Last week, I practised the guitar three times and I learned a new song. I practice three times a week. I am improving slowly, and I will perform for friends soon.

e.p: Have you tried a new hobby recently?
e.m: Nói có/không, nếu có mô tả hoạt động và cảm nhận (thời gian → hành động → kết quả).
e.h: Yes, I + V-ed + time + and + result; I + am + V-ing now / I + will + V
e.s: Yesterday, I tried photography for the first time and I took many pictures. I enjoyed it and I felt creative. I am taking a course now, and I will share photos with friends next week.

e.p: Will you teach your hobby to someone?
e.m: Nói bạn có muốn dạy người khác hay không và nêu kế hoạch ngắn nếu có.
e.h: I + will + V + because + clause; Past Simple mention practice
e.s: Last month, I taught a friend a simple song and she learned quickly. I will teach my hobby to others because it makes me happy. I am preparing lessons now, so the class will be ready soon.

d.t: Giới thiệu ngắn bản thân

e.p: Tell me a little about yourself.
e.m: Giới thiệu 3-4 câu gồm tên, nghề/ngành học, sở thích ngắn gọn.
e.h: Name → Job/Study → Hobby; use and/but/because
e.s: Yesterday, I met a new colleague and I introduced myself. My name is [Your Name], and I study business at university. I like playing football and reading, so I stay active and relaxed. I am planning to learn more English next month.

e.p: What do you study or where do you work?
e.m: Nói nơi bạn học hoặc làm việc, thêm 1 câu về lịch trình hàng ngày.
e.h: I + study/work + at + place; I + usually + V every day
e.s: Last week, I had many classes and I was busy with assignments. I study economics at the university and I usually attend lectures in the morning. I am doing homework now, and I will finish it tonight.

e.p: How would your friend describe you?
e.m: Mô tả 2 tính từ bạn nghĩ bạn bè sẽ dùng và nêu ví dụ quá khứ chứng minh điều đó.
e.h: They + would say + adj and adj; I + V-ed + time + so/result
e.s: Yesterday, my friend said I was helpful when I helped him with a project. They would say I am friendly and reliable. I am trying to support others, so people trust me, and I will keep helping.

e.p: What are your strengths and weaknesses?
e.m: Nêu 1 điểm mạnh và 1 điểm yếu, kèm ví dụ quá khứ và kế hoạch cải thiện.
e.h: My strength is + noun; My weakness is + noun; Past Simple example; I + will + V
e.s: Last year, I improved my communication skills by joining clubs. My strength is communication and my weakness is time management. I am practicing planning now, and I will use a schedule to improve.

e.p: Where do you see yourself in five years?
e.m: Dự đoán tương lai 3-4 câu gồm mục tiêu nghề nghiệp hoặc học tập và lý do.
e.h: In five years, I + will + V; because + reason; Past Simple mention effort
e.s: Last month, I made a study plan and I started working hard. In five years, I will work in a good company and I will maybe lead a team. I am studying now because I want better skills, so I will prepare well.

d.t: Hỏi về hoạt động hàng ngày

e.p: What time do you usually wake up?
e.m: Nói giờ bạn thức dậy và mô tả ngắn hoạt động ngay sau đó.
e.h: I + usually + wake up at + time; Then I + V (present simple)
e.s: Yesterday, I woke up at 7 am and I was late for class. I usually wake up at 6:30 and I have breakfast quickly. I am trying to be on time now, and I will set an alarm tomorrow.

e.p: How do you go to school/work?
e.m: Nói phương tiện bạn dùng và kể một lần bạn có vấn đề khi đi lại.
e.h: I + go + by + transport; One day I + Past Simple + so/result
e.s: Last week, my bus was late and I missed the meeting. I go to work by bus and I read during the trip. I am planning to leave earlier now, so I won't be late again.

e.p: What do you eat for lunch usually?
e.m: Mô tả bữa trưa thường ngày và nói về lần bạn ăn món đó gần đây.
e.h: I + usually + eat + food; Last + time + I + V-ed
e.s: Yesterday, I ate rice with vegetables and it was healthy. I usually eat a simple lunch like rice or noodles. I am trying to eat healthier, and I will cook more at home.

e.p: Do you study English every day?
e.m: Nói tần suất và mô tả 1 hoạt động bạn làm để học (có quá khứ và tương lai).
e.h: I + study + frequency; Last + time + I + V-ed; I + will + V
e.s: Last night, I studied grammar and I practiced speaking with an app. I study English four times a week and I am reviewing vocabulary now. I will join a conversation group next week.

e.p: What do you do to relax in the evening?
e.m: Mô tả hoạt động thư giãn buổi tối có quá khứ, hiện tại và kế hoạch tương lai ngắn.
e.h: Time → Past Simple → Result; I + am + V-ing; I + will + V
e.s: Yesterday, I watched a movie and I felt relaxed afterward. I usually read or listen to music in the evening. I am trying meditation now, and I will practice it more next week.

d.t: Thời gian rảnh và gặp gỡ bạn bè

e.p: Do you often hang out with friends?
e.m: Nói tần suất gặp bạn và một hoạt động bạn thường làm khi gặp họ.
e.h: I + often/sometimes + hang out with friends; We + usually + V
e.s: Last weekend, I hung out with friends and we went to a cafe. I often hang out with friends on Saturdays and we talk a lot. I am meeting them again next weekend, and I will bring a game.

e.p: Where did you meet your best friend?
e.m: Kể nơi gặp người bạn thân và kể một chuyện đã xảy ra khi đó (thời gian → hành động → kết quả).
e.h: I met + person + at + place + time; We + V-ed + so/result
e.s: Two years ago, I met my best friend at a school event and we talked all day. We became close quickly because we had similar interests. I am still friends with them, and I will visit them soon.

e.p: What do you like to do together?
e.m: Nói 2-3 hoạt động bạn và bạn bè làm cùng nhau và kể lần gần nhất.
e.h: We + like + V-ing; Last time we + V-ed + time
e.s: Last week, we played football and then we ate dinner together. We like playing sports and watching movies. I am planning another movie night, and I will invite more friends.

e.p: Have you made any new friends recently?
e.m: Trả lời có/không, nếu có mô tả lần gặp gần đây và mối quan hệ hiện tại.
e.h: Yes, I + have made + friend + time; We + are + V-ing now / I + will + V
e.s: Yesterday, I made a new friend at a language class and we exchanged contacts. We are studying together now and it helps both of us. I will meet them again this weekend.

e.p: Will you introduce your friends to your family?
e.m: Nói bạn có kế hoạch giới thiệu bạn bè cho gia đình không và vì sao.
e.h: I + will + V + because + clause; Past Simple mention
e.s: Last month, I invited a friend home and my family liked them. I will introduce more friends because I want my family to meet important people in my life. I am arranging a dinner now, so everyone can come.

d.t: Nói về sở thích sáng tạo

e.p: Do you like drawing or painting?
e.m: Trả lời thích hay không và nêu lần bạn vẽ gần nhất.
e.h: I + like/don't like + V-ing; Last + time + I + V-ed
e.s: Last weekend, I painted a small picture and it made me happy. I like painting because it relaxes me and I feel creative. I am practicing more now, and I will join an art class soon.

e.p: Have you ever shared your art online?
e.m: Trả lời có/không, nếu có nói khi nào và phản hồi bạn nhận được.
e.h: Yes, I + V-ed + time and + result; I + am + V-ing now / I + will + V
e.s: Yesterday, I posted a photo of my drawing and some friends praised it. Yes, I have shared art online and people gave nice comments. I am planning to post more work, so I will improve my gallery.

e.p: What do you need to start a new creative hobby?
e.m: Liệt kê 2-3 vật dụng hoặc kỹ năng cần thiết và nói bạn đã có những gì (thời gian → hành động → kết quả).
e.h: You need + items/skills; I + have + item; Last + time + I + V-ed
e.s: Last month, I bought brushes and paints and I tried painting at home. You need basic supplies like brushes, paints, and paper. I have some tools now and I am learning techniques, so I will keep practising.

e.p: Do you prefer learning alone or in a group?
e.m: Chọn 1 và giải thích với ví dụ quá khứ và kế hoạch tương lai.
e.h: I + prefer + alone/group because + clause; Past Simple example; I + will + V
e.s: Yesterday, I attended a group workshop and I enjoyed the feedback. I prefer group learning because I get support and ideas. I am joining more workshops, so I will improve faster.

e.p: Will you teach a creative class someday?
e.m: Nói kế hoạch dạy học sáng tạo trong tương lai và lý do.
e.h: I + will + V because + reason; mention Past Simple effort
e.s: Last year, I helped organize a small art event and it was successful. I will teach a creative class someday because I want to share skills. I am preparing materials now, so I will start soon.

d.t: Nói về âm nhạc và giải trí

e.p: What kind of music do you like?
e.m: Nói loại nhạc ưa thích và một bài hát bạn nghe gần đây.
e.h: I + like + genre; I + listened to + song + last + time
e.s: Last week, I listened to a new song and I liked its melody. I like pop music and I enjoy singing along. I am listening to a playlist now, and I will go to a concert next month.

e.p: Do you play any musical instrument?
e.m: Nói có hay không, nếu có nói bạn đã học bao lâu và lần gần nhất tập.
e.h: Yes/No, I + play + instrument; I + have + V-ed for + time; Last + time + I + V-ed
e.s: Yesterday, I practised the guitar for an hour and I learned a new chord. Yes, I play the guitar and I have played for two years. I am improving slowly, and I will perform at a small event soon.

e.p: How often do you go to concerts or shows?
e.m: Nói tần suất và kể về lần gần nhất bạn đi xem (thời gian → hành động → kết quả).
e.h: I + go + to + concerts + frequency; Last + time + I + V-ed + so/result
e.s: Last month, I went to a live show and it was exciting. I go to concerts a few times a year. I am saving money now, so I will go to another concert next season.

e.p: Have you ever sung in front of many people?
e.m: Trả lời có/không, nếu có mô tả lần đó (cảm xúc, kết quả).
e.h: Yes, I + V-ed + time + and + result; I + was + adj; I + will + V
e.s: Last year, I sang at a school event and I felt nervous but happy afterward. Yes, I have sung in front of many people and they clapped a lot. I am practicing now, and I will sing again soon.

e.p: Will you recommend a song to me?
e.m: Giới thiệu một bài hát ngắn gọn và nói vì sao bạn thích nó.
e.h: I + recommend + song; because + reason; Past Simple mention
e.s: Yesterday, I played a song that cheered me up and my friends liked it. I recommend this song because it has a good melody and positive lyrics. I am sending it to you now, and I will share more next time.

d.t: Ăn uống và sở thích ẩm thực

e.p: What's your favorite food?
e.m: Nói món ăn yêu thích và vì sao ngắn gọn.
e.h: My favorite food is + dish; because + reason
e.s: Last weekend, I ate my favorite dish and it tasted great. My favorite food is pho because it is warm and tasty. I am craving it now, and I will cook it at home next week.

e.p: Do you prefer cooking or eating out?
e.m: Chọn 1 và giải thích với ví dụ quá khứ.
e.h: I + prefer + cooking/eating out because + clause; Past Simple example
e.s: Yesterday, I cooked dinner and it was cheaper and healthier. I prefer cooking because I can choose ingredients and it's fun. I am learning new recipes now, and I will invite friends to eat.

e.p: Have you tried international food recently?
e.m: Trả lời có/không, nếu có kể bạn đã thử món gì và cảm nhận.
e.h: Yes, I + V-ed + time; It + was + adj; I + will + V
e.s: Last month, I tried Italian pasta and it was delicious. Yes, I have tried international food and I liked many dishes. I am planning to try more cuisines, so I will visit a new restaurant soon.

e.p: What did you eat yesterday?
e.m: Kể bữa ăn ngày hôm qua theo thứ tự thời gian → hành động → kết quả (3 câu).
e.h: Yesterday + I + V-ed (breakfast/lunch/dinner) → result
e.s: Yesterday, I had toast for breakfast and then I ate noodles for lunch. For dinner, I cooked vegetables and rice, so I felt full and healthy. I am keeping a simple menu now, and I will try a new recipe tomorrow.

e.p: Will you try to cook a new dish this weekend?
e.m: Nói kế hoạch nấu món mới, lý do và một việc bạn đã làm để chuẩn bị.
e.h: I + will + V because + reason; I + have + V-ed to prepare
e.s: Last week, I bought some spices and I read a recipe. I will try to cook a new dish this weekend because I want to learn more. I am preparing ingredients now, so the cooking will be easier.

d.t: Du lịch ngắn ngày

e.p: Do you like short trips?
e.m: Trả lời thích hay không và nêu 1 nơi bạn đã đi gần đây.
e.h: I + like/don't like + short trips; Last + time + I + went to + place
e.s: Last weekend, I went to Da Lat and the weather was nice but a bit cold. I like short trips because they refresh me. I am planning another short trip soon, and I will invite a friend.

e.p: Where did you go last weekend?
e.m: Nói địa điểm bạn đến cuối tuần trước và mô tả hoạt động chính bạn làm ở đó.
e.h: Last weekend, I + V-ed + place and + V-ed; result
e.s: Last weekend, I visited Ho Tram and I relaxed on the beach. I walked a lot and took photos, so I felt calm. I am sharing pictures with friends now, and I will go back someday.

e.p: How do you plan a short trip?
e.m: Mô tả 3 bước bạn làm khi lên kế hoạch (ví dụ: đặt vé, chuẩn bị hành lý, lập lịch).
e.h: First + Past Simple/Present Simple; Then + Past Simple/Present; Finally + Future
e.s: Last month, I booked tickets and I packed my bag in one day. First I check transport and book tickets, then I prepare a small bag and map. I am choosing places now, and I will finalise the plan tomorrow.

e.p: Have you ever had a problem on a trip?
e.m: Trả lời có/không, nếu có kể sự cố và cách bạn giải quyết (thời gian → hành động → kết quả).
e.h: Yes, I + V-ed + time + and + we/I + V-ed to solve it
e.s: Last year, my luggage was lost at the airport and I was worried. Yes, I had a problem but I contacted the airline and they found it. I am careful now, so I will label my bags next time.

e.p: Will you travel with family or friends next time?
e.m: Nói kế hoạch tương lai và lý do chọn người đồng hành.
e.h: I + will + travel with + people because + reason; Past Simple mention
e.s: Last holiday, I travelled with friends and we had fun together. I will travel with my family next time because I want to spend time with them. I am saving money now, so the trip will be better.

d.t: Học tập và kế hoạch học

e.p: What subject do you like at school?
e.m: Nói 1 môn bạn thích và lý do ngắn gọn.
e.h: I + like + subject + because + reason
e.s: Yesterday, we had a good math class and I enjoyed solving problems. I like math because it is logical and satisfying. I am studying it more now, and I will practice exercises tonight.

e.p: Did you study last night?
e.m: Trả lời có/không và kể bạn đã học gì (thời gian → hành động → kết quả).
e.h: Yes, I + V-ed + last night and + result; I + am + V-ing now / I + will + V
e.s: Last night, I studied vocabulary and I felt more confident. Yes, I reviewed new words and I practised speaking. I am revising again now, and I will join a class tomorrow.

e.p: How do you prepare for exams?
e.m: Mô tả 2-3 bước ôn tập bạn làm, có ít nhất một câu quá khứ và một câu tương lai.
e.h: I + usually + V; Last + time + I + V-ed; I + will + V
e.s: Last semester, I made a study schedule and it helped me pass the exam. I usually make notes and practise past papers. I am revising the notes now, and I will study with friends next week.

e.p: Have you ever failed a test? What did you do?
e.m: Trả lời có/không; nếu có mô tả hành động bạn làm sau đó để cải thiện (thời gian → hành động → kết quả).
e.h: Yes, I + failed + test + time; I + then + V-ed + and + result
e.s: Last year, I failed a math test and I felt disappointed. Yes, I failed once but I practised more and I asked the teacher for help. I am studying regularly now, so I passed the next test.

e.p: Will you study abroad in the future?
e.m: Nói kế hoạch du học nếu có, nêu lý do và bước bạn đã làm để chuẩn bị.
e.h: I + will + study abroad because + reason; I + have + V-ed to prepare
e.s: Last month, I researched programs and I contacted a university. I will study abroad because I want broader experience and language practice. I am preparing documents now, so I will apply soon.

d.t: Kỹ năng và khả năng

e.p: Can you cook?
e.m: Trả lời có/không và nêu một món bạn biết nấu.
e.h: Yes/No, I + can + cook + dish; Last + time + I + V-ed
e.s: Yesterday, I cooked fried rice and it was tasty. Yes, I can cook basic meals like fried rice. I am improving recipes now, and I will try a new dish next week.

e.p: Are you good at languages?
e.m: Nói trình độ tiếng Anh ngắn gọn và một ví dụ bạn dùng ngôn ngữ đó trước đây.
e.h: I + am + good/average/beginner at + language; Last + time + I + used + language
e.s: Last week, I had a chat with a foreigner and I used English to communicate. I am fairly good at English and I practise regularly. I am studying more now, and I will travel to practise speaking.

e.p: How did you learn your skills?
e.m: Mô tả cách bạn học 1 kỹ năng chính (thời gian → hành động → kết quả).
e.h: Time → Past Simple → Result; I + practiced/studied + so/result
e.s: Two years ago, I took online classes and I practised every day. I learned by watching videos and repeating exercises, so I improved. I am doing advanced practice now, and I will master it in time.

e.p: Do you think you can improve quickly?
e.m: Đưa ý kiến có thể cải thiện nhanh hay không, nêu ví dụ quá khứ và kế hoạch.
e.h: I + think + I + can/cannot + improve quickly because + reason; Past Simple mention
e.s: Last month, I improved my pronunciation after daily practice and recordings. I think I can improve quickly if I work consistently because practice helps. I am following a plan now, and I will measure progress soon.

e.p: Will you learn a new skill this year?
e.m: Nói kế hoạch học kỹ năng mới, lý do và bước bạn đã bắt đầu.
e.h: I + will + learn + skill because + reason; I + have + V-ed to start
e.s: Yesterday, I signed up for a coding course and I felt excited. I will learn basic coding this year because it helps my career. I am doing the first lesson now, so I will continue weekly.

d.t: Cảm xúc và quan điểm

e.p: What makes you happy?
e.m: Nêu 1-2 điều khiến bạn vui và kể một lần gần đây bạn cảm thấy như vậy.
e.h: I + feel happy when + clause; Last + time + I + V-ed
e.s: Last weekend, I spent time with family and I felt happy. I feel happy when I help others and when I achieve small goals. I am doing small tasks now, and I will celebrate when I finish.

e.p: Are you worried about anything now?
e.m: Trả lời có/không, nếu có nêu 1 mối lo và cách bạn xử lý nó.
e.h: Yes, I + am worried about + noun; I + am + V-ing to handle it; Past Simple mention
e.s: Yesterday, I worried about an exam and I studied more to prepare. Yes, I am worried about upcoming tests but I am studying hard to handle it. I will relax after the exam.

e.p: How do you feel about moving to a new city?
e.m: Nói cảm xúc của bạn về việc chuyển thành phố, nêu ví dụ quá khứ và kế hoạch tương lai.
e.h: I + feel + adj about + moving; Last + time + I + V-ed; I + will + V
e.s: Last month, I visited the new city and I liked the atmosphere. I feel excited and a little nervous about moving. I am preparing documents now, and I will move next month.

e.p: Do you agree that hobbies are important?
e.m: Nêu quan điểm có đồng ý hay không và lý do kèm ví dụ thực tế.
e.h: I + agree/disagree + because + reason; Past Simple example
e.s: Last year, my hobby helped me reduce stress and improve my mood. I agree that hobbies are important because they balance work and life. I am keeping my hobbies now, so I stay healthy mentally.

e.p: Will you change your opinion about something soon?
e.m: Nói có khả năng thay đổi ý kiến không và nêu điều gì có thể làm bạn thay đổi ý kiến đó.
e.h: I + might/might not + change my opinion if + reason; Past Simple mention
e.s: Yesterday, I heard new information and I reconsidered my view on the topic. I might change my opinion if I learn more facts because evidence matters. I am researching now, so I will decide later.

d.t: Kế hoạch cuối tuần

e.p: What are your plans for the weekend?
e.m: Nói kế hoạch cuối tuần (2-3 hoạt động) và thời gian thực hiện.
e.h: This weekend, I + will + V; on + day + I + will + V
e.s: Last weekend, I rested at home and I felt refreshed. This weekend, I will visit a friend on Saturday and I will study on Sunday. I am preparing now, so everything is ready.

e.p: Did you do anything special last weekend?
e.m: Kể hoạt động đặc biệt bạn đã làm cuối tuần trước (thời gian → hành động → kết quả).
e.h: Last weekend, I + V-ed + and + result
e.s: Last weekend, I went to a concert and I had a great time. I danced and sang with friends, so I felt joyful. I am still listening to songs from the concert, and I will go again.

e.p: Do you usually relax or work on weekends?
e.m: Nói thói quen chung của bạn cho cuối tuần và nêu ví dụ quá khứ.
e.h: I + usually + relax/work; Last + time + I + V-ed
e.s: Yesterday, I relaxed and I finished a book. I usually relax on weekends but I also study sometimes. I am planning a rest this weekend, so I can recharge.

e.p: Who will you meet this weekend?
e.m: Nói người bạn sẽ gặp và hoạt động bạn sẽ làm cùng họ.
e.h: I + will + meet + person; We + will + V; Past Simple mention
e.s: Last week, I invited a friend and we planned activities together. I will meet my cousin this weekend and we will go to a museum. I am excited now, so I will buy tickets tomorrow.

e.p: Will you try something new this weekend?
e.m: Nói bạn có thử điều mới không và mô tả ngắn điều đó và lý do.
e.h: I + will/won't + try + activity because + reason; Past Simple mention
e.s: Yesterday, I read about a new cafe and I decided to visit it. I will try a new activity this weekend because I want variety in my life. I am making a small plan now, so the visit will be easy.

d.t: Giao tiếp xã hội đơn giản

e.p: Can I join you?
e.m: Trả lời có/không lịch sự và mời họ vào nhóm hoặc giải thích lý do.
e.h: Yes, you + can/join + or No, sorry + because + reason
e.s: Yesterday, I invited a new student and we welcomed them warmly. Yes, you can join us and we will be happy to have you. I am talking with them now, and I will introduce you soon.

e.p: Would you like a cup of tea?
e.m: Chấp nhận hoặc từ chối lịch sự và nêu lý do ngắn.
e.h: Yes, please/No, thank you + because + clause
e.s: This morning, someone offered me tea and it helped me feel better. Yes, please, I would like a cup of tea because I am a bit cold. I will drink it slowly, and I am thankful.

e.p: Excuse me, could you help me?
e.m: Phản hồi rằng bạn sẽ giúp và nói bạn sẽ làm gì hoặc nếu không thể thì đưa lý do.
e.h: Sure, I + will + V; Sorry, I + can't + because + reason
e.s: Yesterday, I helped a neighbor carry groceries and it felt good. Sure, I will help you and I can show you the way. I am available now, so let's go.

e.p: Do you mind if I open the window?
e.m: Cho phép hoặc từ chối lịch sự, nêu lý do ngắn.
e.h: No, go ahead/Yes, please don't + because + reason
e.s: This afternoon, it was hot and someone opened the window to cool the room. No, go ahead, I don't mind because fresh air is nice. I am opening the door too, so it will be cooler.

e.p: Will you come to my party next week?
e.m: Trả lời có/không, nêu lý do và mô tả 1 việc bạn đã làm để chuẩn bị hoặc sẽ làm.
e.h: Yes, I + will + come because + reason; I + have + V-ed / I + will + V
e.s: Last week, I received an invitation and I saved the date. Yes, I will come to your party because I enjoy spending time with friends. I am preparing a small gift now, and I will bring it on the day.

d.t: Mua sắm và tiền bạc

e.p: How much did it cost?
e.m: Nói giá tiền bằng cách đơn giản và thêm bạn nghĩ giá đó như thế nào.
e.h: It cost + amount; I + think + it + is/was + adj
e.s: Yesterday, I bought a jacket and it cost 300,000 VND. It cost 300,000 VND and I think it was affordable. I am saving money now, so I bought it on sale.

e.p: Do you prefer shopping online or in stores?
e.m: Chọn 1 và giải thích với ví dụ quá khứ.
e.h: I + prefer + online/in stores because + reason; Last + time + I + V-ed
e.s: Last month, I bought shoes online and they arrived fast and fit well. I prefer shopping online because it's convenient and often cheaper. I am checking reviews now, so I will buy carefully.

e.p: Did you buy anything yesterday?
e.m: Trả lời có/không và kể món bạn đã mua (thời gian → hành động → kết quả).
e.h: Yes, I + V-ed + yesterday and + result; I + am + V-ing / I + will + V
e.s: Yesterday, I bought groceries and I cooked dinner with them. Yes, I bought vegetables and meat, so I could make a healthy meal. I am using leftovers now, and I will shop again next week.

e.p: Will you save money for something special?
e.m: Nói bạn có mục tiêu tiết kiệm không, nêu mục tiêu và hành động bạn đã làm hoặc sẽ làm.
e.h: I + will + save money for + goal because + reason; I + have + V-ed to start
e.s: Last month, I started a savings plan and I put money aside each week. I will save money for a trip because I want to travel. I am following a budget now, so the plan is going well.

e.p: Can you lend me some money?
e.m: Phản hồi yêu cầu mượn tiền lịch sự: đồng ý hay từ chối và nêu lý do, có đề xuất giải pháp nếu không thể cho mượn.
e.h: Yes, I + can + lend + amount / No, I + can't + because + reason; I + will + help in another way
e.s: Yesterday, a friend asked me for help and I lent a small amount to support them. Sorry, I can't lend money now because I have limited savings, but I will help in another way. I am available to give advice or assist with tasks.

d.t: Sức khỏe và thể thao

e.p: Do you play any sports?
e.m: Nói bạn chơi thể thao gì và tần suất.
e.h: I + play + sport + frequency; Last + time + I + V-ed
e.s: Last weekend, I played football with friends and we had fun. I play football twice a week and I enjoy it. I am training now, and I will join a small match next month.

e.p: How did you exercise yesterday?
e.m: Kể hoạt động tập luyện bạn làm hôm qua theo thứ tự thời gian → hành động → kết quả.
e.h: Yesterday, I + V-ed + and + result
e.s: Yesterday, I jogged in the park and I felt energetic afterward. I ran for thirty minutes and then stretched, so my muscles felt good. I am resting today, and I will run again tomorrow.

e.p: Have you ever joined a sports club?
e.m: Trả lời có/không, nếu có kể khi bạn tham gia và một kỷ niệm.
e.h: Yes, I + joined + time + club and + Past Simple; I + am + V-ing / I + will + V
e.s: Last year, I joined a local football club and we trained every weekend. Yes, I joined a club and we won a small tournament once. I am practising now, and I will play matches again soon.

e.p: Do you think exercise is important?
e.m: Nêu quan điểm có/không và giải thích với ví dụ thực tế.
e.h: I + think + exercise + is important because + reason; Past Simple example
e.s: Last month, after regular exercise, I felt healthier and more energetic. I think exercise is important because it improves mood and health. I am continuing my routine now, so I will stay healthy.

e.p: Will you try a new sport this year?
e.m: Nói kế hoạch thử môn thể thao mới, lý do và bước bạn đã làm để bắt đầu.
e.h: I + will + try + sport because + reason; I + have + V-ed to prepare
e.s: Yesterday, I signed up for a swimming class and I felt excited. I will try swimming this year because I want better fitness. I am buying a swimsuit now, so I will start lessons next week.

d.t: Kết bạn và gặp gỡ mới

e.p: Do you like meeting new people?
e.m: Trả lời thích hay không và nêu một ví dụ bạn đã gặp người mới gần đây.
e.h: I + like/don't like + meeting new people; Last + time + I + V-ed
e.s: Last week, I met a new classmate and we had a nice talk. I like meeting new people because I learn different views. I am attending events now, and I will meet more people soon.

e.p: How do you introduce yourself to strangers?
e.m: Mô tả 2-3 câu giới thiệu bạn thường dùng (thời gian → hành động → kết quả).
e.h: I + say + greeting + name + and + short info; Last + time + I + V-ed
e.s: Yesterday, I introduced myself at a club meeting and I felt confident. I say hi, tell my name, and mention what I do. I am preparing a short intro now, so I will be ready next time.

e.p: Have you made friends online?
e.m: Trả lời có/không, nếu có kể trải nghiệm và mức độ bạn giao tiếp (thời gian → hành động → kết quả).
e.h: Yes, I + have made + friends online; We + V-ed + time; I + am + V-ing
e.s: Last year, I joined an online group and I made good friends who help me practise English. Yes, I have made friends online and we chat often. I am talking with them now, and I will meet some in person later.

e.p: Do you prefer small groups or big parties to meet people?
e.m: Chọn và giải thích với ví dụ quá khứ và dự định tương lai.
e.h: I + prefer + small/big + groups because + reason; Past Simple; I + will + V
e.s: Yesterday, I attended a small gathering and I had meaningful conversations. I prefer small groups because it's easier to talk and connect. I am organizing a small meeting now, and I will invite close friends.

e.p: Will you try to make more friends this year?
e.m: Nói kế hoạch kết bạn, tại sao và việc bạn đã bắt đầu làm để đạt mục tiêu đó.
e.h: I + will + try to + V because + reason; I + have + V-ed to start
e.s: Last month, I joined a new club and I met several people. I will try to make more friends this year because social connections are important. I am attending events now, so I will meet new people soon.

d.t: Ôn tập giới thiệu bản thân và gia đình

e.p: Hi, can you introduce yourself and your family briefly?
e.m: Giới thiệu bản thân và 2-3 thành viên trong gia đình (3 câu theo cấu trúc thời gian → hành động → kết quả).
e.h: Time → Past Simple → Result; Name → Family members → short fact; include and/but
e.s: Yesterday, I showed family photos to a friend and we talked about them. My name is [Your Name], I live with my parents and one sister. We are close and we help each other, so family time is important to me and I will visit them this weekend.

e.p: Where do your parents work and what do they like?
e.m: Nói nghề nghiệp của bố mẹ và một sở thích của mỗi người (3 câu).
e.h: Parent + is/works as + job; They + like + V-ing; Past Simple mention
e.s: Last week, my father retired and he started a new hobby. My father was a teacher and my mother is a nurse. They like gardening and cooking, and I am helping them sometimes so we spend time together.

e.p: How old are your siblings and what do they do?
e.m: Nêu tuổi và nghề/hoạt động của anh/chị/em, kèm một câu kể về lần gần đây bạn làm việc cùng họ.
e.h: He/She + is + age + and + works/studies as + job; Last + time + we + V-ed
e.s: Last weekend, my brother and I cleaned the house together and it was efficient. My brother is 25 and he works in IT, my sister is 20 and she studies medicine. They are busy but we are close, so we help each other when needed.

e.p: Do you and your family have any regular weekend plans?
e.m: Mô tả thói quen cuối tuần của gia đình (3-4 câu, có quá khứ và tương lai).
e.h: We + usually + V; Last + weekend + we + V-ed; I + will + V
e.s: Last weekend, we visited a local market and bought fresh food. We usually have a family dinner on Sundays and sometimes watch movies. I am planning a picnic with them next weekend, so we will relax together.

e.p: Will your family support you if you study or work abroad?
e.m: Trả lời có/không, nêu lý do và một ví dụ quá khứ cho thấy sự ủng hộ của gia đình.
e.h: Yes/No, they + will + support because + reason; Past Simple example
e.s: Last year, my family supported my decision to join a course and they helped me financially. Yes, my family will support me if I study or work abroad because they trust my choices. I am discussing plans with them now, so we will prepare together.

d.t: Ôn tập sở thích và hoạt động hàng ngày

e.p: Tell me about your daily routine and weekend hobbies.
e.m: Mô tả 3-4 câu: thói quen hàng ngày và một sở thích cuối tuần (thời gian → hành động → kết quả).
e.h: Time → Past Simple/Present Simple → Result; include and/but
e.s: Yesterday, I woke up early and I did my homework before breakfast. I usually study in the morning and exercise in the evening. On weekends, I play football with friends and I relax, so I feel refreshed and ready for the week.

e.p: What did you do last weekend and what will you do next weekend?
e.m: So sánh cuối tuần trước và kế hoạch cuối tuần tới (3-4 câu).
e.h: Last weekend + I + V-ed; Next weekend + I + will + V; include because/so
e.s: Last weekend, I visited my grandparents and we had a nice meal together. Next weekend, I will go to a movie with friends because we want to relax. I am excited now, and I am buying tickets soon.

e.p: How do your hobbies help you in daily life?
e.m: Giải thích 2 cách sở thích giúp bạn (1 câu quá khứ, 1 câu hiện tại, 1 câu tương lai).
e.h: Past Simple example; I + am + V-ing; I + will + V
e.s: Last year, my hobby of running helped me reduce stress during exams. I am running regularly now and it improves my energy. I will continue this habit because it helps my focus.

e.p: Have your hobbies changed since you were a child?
e.m: Trả lời có/không và nêu ví dụ về sự thay đổi (thời gian → hành động → kết quả).
e.h: Yes, I + used to + V; Now I + V; Last + time + I + V-ed
e.s: When I was a child, I used to play with toys but now I enjoy sports and reading. Last weekend, I played board games with family and we remembered old times. I am discovering new hobbies now, and I will try more activities.

e.p: Will you recommend a hobby to someone who is bored?
e.m: Đề xuất một sở thích cho người chán nản và giải thích lợi ích ngắn gọn.
e.h: I + recommend + V-ing because + reason; Past Simple example; I + will + V
e.s: Yesterday, I recommended reading to a friend and they felt better after starting a book. I recommend joining a sport or art class because it boosts mood and skills. I am helping friends choose activities now, so I will support them.

d.t: Ôn tập giao tiếp và mối quan hệ xã hội

e.p: How do you start a conversation with a stranger?
e.m: Mô tả 2-3 câu về cách bắt chuyện tự nhiên và ví dụ bạn đã làm gần đây.
e.h: Start with greeting + question; Last + time + I + V-ed; include and/but
e.s: Yesterday, I started a conversation with a neighbor by asking about the weather and we talked for a while. I usually say hello and ask a simple question to begin. I am practising small talk now, and I will join more events.

e.p: Did you help someone recently? How?
e.m: Kể một việc bạn đã giúp người khác gần đây (thời gian → hành động → kết quả).
e.h: Yesterday/Last week + I + V-ed + and + result
e.s: Last week, I helped a friend move and we finished quickly together. I carried boxes and organised things, so the task was easier. I am happy I helped, and I will help again if they need me.

e.p: What would you do if a friend was sad?
e.m: Mô tả 2-3 bước bạn sẽ làm để an ủi bạn (kèm một ví dụ quá khứ).
e.h: First + I + V-ed (past); Then + I + will + V; because + reason
e.s: Yesterday, a friend was upset and I listened to them and offered advice. First I would listen, then I would spend time with them and help find solutions. I am ready to support friends, so I will be there when needed.

e.p: Do you make plans with friends often?
e.m: Nói tần suất lên kế hoạch với bạn bè và kể lần gần nhất (thời gian → hành động → kết quả).
e.h: I + often/sometimes + make plans; Last + time + we + V-ed
e.s: Last weekend, we planned a picnic and everyone brought food, so it was fun. I often make plans with friends on weekends. I am organising another activity now, and I will confirm details soon.

e.p: Will you stay in touch with long-distance friends?
e.m: Nói kế hoạch giữ liên lạc với bạn ở xa và một hành động bạn đã làm để giữ liên lạc.
e.h: I + will + stay in touch by + method; I + have + V-ed (past) to keep contact
e.s: Last month, I called a friend who moved abroad and we talked for hours. I will stay in touch with long-distance friends by calling and messaging regularly. I am scheduling chats now, so we will keep connected.

d.t: Ôn tập nâng cao: lập luận đơn giản và cảm xúc

e.p: Why is it important to have hobbies?
e.m: Trình bày 2 lý do đơn giản và một ví dụ cá nhân (thời gian → hành động → kết quả).
e.h: Reason 1 + because + clause; Reason 2 + example (Past Simple) → result
e.s: Last year, my hobby helped me manage stress during exams and I felt calmer. Hobbies are important because they reduce stress and develop skills. I am practising mine now, so I will stay balanced.

e.p: Do you think people should work less and relax more?
e.m: Nêu quan điểm của bạn ngắn gọn, kèm 1 ví dụ trong quá khứ và một hành động đề xuất tương lai.
e.h: I + think + clause because + reason; Past Simple example; I + will + V
e.s: Last month, I worked many hours and I felt tired and less productive. I think people should balance work and rest because burnout reduces efficiency. I am planning to schedule breaks now, and I will encourage others to do the same.

e.p: How do you decide who to trust?
e.m: Mô tả 2 tiêu chí bạn dùng để tin tưởng ai đó và một lần bạn áp dụng tiêu chí đó (thời gian → hành động → kết quả).
e.h: Criterion 1 + because + reason; Criterion 2 + Past Simple example → result
e.s: Yesterday, I trusted a colleague because they proved reliable in a previous project. I decide to trust people who are honest and consistent. I am observing behaviour now, so I will trust those who act responsibly.

e.p: Is it better to follow a crowd or your own plan?
e.m: Nêu quan điểm, so sánh ngắn và dẫn chứng một việc bạn đã chọn theo kế hoạch riêng (thời gian → hành động → kết quả).
e.h: I + prefer + following my plan because + reason; Past Simple example → result; I + will + V
e.s: Last weekend, I followed my own plan to study and I finished tasks while others went out. I prefer following my plan because it helps me reach goals and stay focused. I am keeping my schedule now, so I will achieve more.

e.p: Will you change a habit if it affects your health?
e.m: Trả lời có/không, nêu ví dụ thói quen bạn đã thay đổi trước đây và kế hoạch thay đổi tiếp theo.
e.h: Yes, I + will + change because + reason; Past Simple example; I + am + V-ing
e.s: Last year, I stopped drinking too much coffee because it affected my sleep and I felt better. Yes, I will change a habit if it harms my health because health is important. I am avoiding late-night snacks now, so I will sleep better.

d.t: Ôn tập tổng hợp: cuộc hội thoại 1

e.p: Hi, can you tell me your name and where you live?
e.m: Giới thiệu tên bằng [Your Name] và nơi bạn sống (3 câu: thời gian → hành động → kết quả).
e.h: Time → Past Simple → Result; Name + live; include and/but
e.s: Yesterday, I moved some boxes and showed my new apartment to a friend. My name is [Your Name] and I live in District 3. I am settling in now, and I will invite friends to visit next weekend.

e.p: How many people are in your family and what do they do?
e.m: Nói số thành viên và nghề/nghiệp của họ (3 câu).
e.h: I + have + number + family members; They + are/work as + jobs; Past Simple mention
e.s: Last weekend, my family gathered and we had dinner together. I have four family members: my parents and one sister. My father is a teacher and my mother is a nurse, and I am proud of them.

e.p: What do you do in your free time?
e.m: Mô tả 2 hoạt động bạn làm trong thời gian rảnh và nêu một hoạt động bạn đã làm gần đây.
e.h: I + like + V-ing and + V-ing; Last + time + I + V-ed; I + will + V
e.s: Yesterday, I played football and then I read a book, which made me relaxed. I like playing sports and reading in my free time. I am joining a book club now, so I will meet people who like reading.

e.p: Have you travelled recently? Where and what happened?
e.m: Kể một chuyến đi gần đây theo cấu trúc thời gian → hành động → kết quả (3 câu).
e.h: Last + time + I + V-ed + place; What happened → result; I + will + V
e.s: Last weekend, I travelled to Hue and I visited historical sites with my friends. We learned a lot about history and tried local food, so it was memorable. I am planning another trip next month.

e.p: Will you invite me to hang out next time?
e.m: Trả lời có/không lịch sự, nêu kế hoạch cụ thể nếu có và một việc bạn đã làm để chuẩn bị cho lần gặp.
e.h: Yes, I + will + invite you + when/where; I + have + V-ed to prepare; Past Simple mention
e.s: Yesterday, I organised a small gathering and I learned how to plan better. Yes, I will invite you to hang out next Saturday at the cafe because it's cosy. I am arranging the details now, so the meeting will be comfortable.

d.t: Ôn tập tổng hợp: cuộc hội thoại 2

e.p: Hi, what's your name and how old are you?
e.m: Chào lại, giới thiệu tên bằng [Your Name] và tuổi (3 câu).
e.h: Name + age; Time → Past Simple → Result; include because/so
e.s: Yesterday, I celebrated a small birthday with family and it was fun. My name is [Your Name] and I am 20 years old. I am thankful for my family, so I will spend more time with them.

e.p: Do you work or study? Where and what do you do?
e.m: Nói bạn làm nghề gì hoặc học ở đâu và một nhiệm vụ bạn làm gần đây.
e.h: I + work/study + at + place; Last + time + I + V-ed; I + will + V
e.s: Last week, I finished a project at work and my manager was happy. I work as a marketing assistant at a small company. I am preparing a new campaign now, and I will present it next Monday.

e.p: What are your hobbies and how often do you do them?
e.m: Liệt kê 2 sở thích và tần suất; nêu ví dụ hoạt động gần nhất.
e.h: I + like + V-ing; I + usually + V (frequency); Last + time + I + V-ed
e.s: Last weekend, I painted for two hours and enjoyed it. I like painting and cycling, and I usually paint on Sundays and cycle twice a week. I am practising now, so I will join a local art group soon.

e.p: Have you visited any interesting places this year?
e.m: Trả lời có/không và kể một chuyến đi đáng chú ý (thời gian → hành động → kết quả).
e.h: Yes, I + V-ed + place + time; It + was + adj; I + will + V
e.s: Last month, I visited Da Nang and I tried local food that I liked. Yes, I visited an interesting place and it was memorable. I am sharing photos now, and I will travel again during holidays.

e.p: Will you keep in touch after today?
e.m: Nói có/không và nêu cách bạn sẽ giữ liên lạc (một việc bạn đã làm để chuẩn bị).
e.h: Yes, I + will + stay in touch by + method; I + have + V-ed to prepare
e.s: Yesterday, I exchanged contacts with new friends and we made plans to meet. Yes, I will keep in touch by messaging and calling. I am saving your number now, so I will contact you soon.
